title: ROBMA Reproducibility Capsule: a software tool for reviewer-auditable evidence synthesis
description: Zenodo release metadata for the ROBMA Reproducibility Capsule software package stored under C:/Models/ROBMA. Mint the DOI from the next public GitHub release and then update the F1000 software-availability section to cite the resulting archive record.
notes: Reproducibility capsule for Robust Bayesian Model Averaging. Includes example dataset, tutorial walkthrough, validation summary, and F1000 manuscript materials.
